name: lockerwise
description: LockerWise monorepo: Express backend serves Vite React frontend build.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
